title: NhatJS's NGMC Furniture Project
description: The new generation of Furniture Mod comes with minimalistic and realistic features!
body:
Welcome to NhatJS's NGMC Furniture Project Mod! This is potentially the sequel of [NhatJS's Furniture Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/nhatjs-furniture-mod). which is more than just decorations, such as animated models (not just textures), sittable chairs, object movements, etc... Not only yet, you will see more low-poly but realistic and minimalistic models. Like previous mod, you can also build your own decorations using many new furnitures based on your imaginations. Please join [Discord](https://discord.gg/nf7XR6vG4y) server to share bugs you want me to fix, or feel free to have several ideas!

**Previously, I promise you all to reveal new crafting recipes formula, but then... it's complicated for me :) to show you! So, I ask you: Would you like to include JEI (NeoForge, Forge) and REI (Fabric)? I am sorry if I never use that JEI or REI before :)**

**Required for newest 0.0.5-beta:**

- Forge users: [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
- NeoForge & Fabric/Quilt users: [Iris Shaders](https://www.irisshaders.dev/), [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)

**I highly recommended to use my mod with these required instructions above because some furnitures contain emissive or bright textures.**
